summary: Execute Rwanda Revenue Authority follow-up now to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo; email if no connect; fully log in CRM within 60 minutes.
reasoning: Within Kigali business hours, no active deals, 4 overdue tasks, and idle sales capacity; this is the fastest path to creating pipeline. Prior identical directives remain unexecuted—issue for immediate action with micro-deadlines.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now (CAT) to book 30-minute discovery/demo; email if no connect; log in CRM
task.description:
Execute immediately with these checkpoints and micro-deadlines:
1) CRM prep (5–10 min): Create the company “Rwanda Revenue Authority” and a new deal (stage: Discovery/Qualification); link the existing contact; attach all prior notes.
2) Call now (08:30–17:30 CAT): Dial the primary contact immediately. If no answer, leave voicemail (if available) and within 10 minutes attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard. If the number is missing/invalid, proceed to step 6.
3) On connect: Confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance steps; handle objections; secure a 30-minute discovery/demo this week and send the calendar invite before ending the call.
4) If no connect: Within 10 minutes send a concise follow-up email proposing three 30-minute Kigali-time slots over the next 3 business days; include a clear agenda, a one-pager, and a relevant case study; cc known stakeholders.
5) CRM logging: Record all call attempts/voicemail/email with outcomes. If the meeting is booked, update stage to Discovery Scheduled and attach the invite. If not booked, schedule next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted.
6) Data gaps: If phone numbers are invalid or email bounces, list exact gaps (contact name, direct line, switchboard, alt emails) and hand off to research for enrichment.
7) Status: Post a brief summary of attempts, outcomes, and next steps within 60 minutes.
Voicemail script (30s): “Hello [Name], this is [Your Name] from Luuku AI. Following up on how we can help RRA streamline [brief value]. I’d like to schedule a 30-minute discovery/demo this week. I’ll email three Kigali-time options. You can also reach me at [number]. Thank you.”
Email subject: Luuku AI x RRA — 30‑min discovery/demo (this week)
Email body (concise): Hi [Name], great to connect recently. We can help RRA [1–2 outcomes]. Proposed 30‑min slots (Kigali/CAT): [Slot 1], [Slot 2], [Slot 3]. Agenda: 1) RRA priorities, 2) Luuku AI overview and demo, 3) Fit, timeline, compliance. Attaching a one-pager and a relevant case study. Please confirm a slot or suggest alternatives. Best, [Your Name] [Title] [Contact].
